So the remaining penguins are Louis, Vincent, and Gwen. Question: How many penguins are less than 10 years old? We need to check the ages of the remaining penguins and count those with age < 10. Louis is 7 years old, which is less than 10. Vincent is 9 years old, which is also less than 10. Gwen is 8 years old, which is also less than 10. So all three penguins (Louis, Vincent, Gwen) are less than 10 years old. The answer would be 3, which is option C. Wait, but let me double-check.
